title: Trio gets three years correctional supervision for assaulting police officer
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Regional Court has...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Regional Court has sentenced three men to three years of correctional supervision following a violent assault on a senior police officer in early 2023.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Regional Court has sentenced three men to three years of correctional supervision following a violent assault on a senior police officer in early 2023."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mikel Goliath (26), Amos Levi (24) and Jessie Jaun Jacobs (31) pleaded guilty to charges of assault with intent to cause grievous bodily harm (GBH).","html":"Mikel Goliath (26), Amos Levi (24) and Jessie Jaun Jacobs (31) pleaded guilty to charges of assault with intent to cause grievous bodily harm (GBH)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The sentencing, handed down yesterday18 August, falls under the provisions of the Criminal Procedure Act, No. 51 of 1977.","html":"The sentencing, handed down yesterday18 August, falls under the provisions of the Criminal Procedure Act, No. 51 of 1977."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In addition to their sentences, the trio was declared unfit to possess firearms."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The incident dates back to January 2023 at the Knysna taxi rank, where the station commander of Kwanokuthula SAPS was confronted by a group of Rastafarian individuals.","html":"The incident dates back to January 2023 at the Knysna taxi rank, where the station commander of Kwanokuthula SAPS was confronted by a group of Rastafarian individuals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The group accused the officer of being involved in a police operation that had led to the seizure of dagga (cannabis). Tensions escalated when members of the group, including the three convicted men, physically attacked the officer.","html":"The group accused the officer of being involved in a police operation that had led to the seizure of dagga (cannabis). Tensions escalated when members of the group, including the three convicted men, physically attacked the officer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to court proceedings, the officer attempted to flee but fell to the ground, at which point the assailants continued to assault him. He sustained a broken wrist and required medical treatment at a nearby hospital.","html":"According to court proceedings, the officer attempted to flee but fell to the ground, at which point the assailants continued to assault him. He sustained a broken wrist and required medical treatment at a nearby hospital."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Following an investigation, four suspects were arrested in connection with the assault. However, charges against one of the accused were later withdrawn.","html":"Following an investigation, four suspects were arrested in connection with the assault. However, charges against one of the accused were later withdrawn."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]

images.alt: Trio gets three years correctional supervision for assaulting police officer
